hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && old=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && { git pull --rebase --autostash >/dev/null 2>&1 || git rebase --abort >/dev/null 2>&1; }; new=$(git rev-parse HEAD); if [ "$old" != "$new" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Synced latest Unison changes from GitHub"}'; fi; true
hooks.statusMessage: Syncing latest Unison changes from GitHub

hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && n=$(git rev-list --count '@{u}..HEAD' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$n" -gt 0 ]; then git push >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Auto-pushed $n commit(s) to GitHub\"}"; fi; true
